tools.name: country.getDailyReportAllCountries
tools.description: Get daily report for all countries. Date is mandatory parametar. Date format is by ISO 8601 standard, but you can provide different format with date-format parameter.

tools.name: country.getDailyReportByCountryCode
tools.description: Get daily report for specific country. Country code and date are mandatory in parametars. Country code is in ISO 3166-1 standard. It can be 2 chars (Alpha-2) or 3 chars (Alpha-3) type. Date format is by ISO 8601 standard, but you can provide different format with date-format parameter

tools.name: country.getDailyReportByCountryName
tools.description: Get daily report for specific country. Country name and date are mandatory in parametars. Date format is by ISO 8601 standard, but you can provide different format with date-format parameter

tools.name: country.getLatestAllCountries
tools.description: Get latest data from all countries.

tools.name: country.getLatestCountryDataByCode
tools.description: Get latest data for specific country. Country code and format are in parametars. Country code is in ISO 3166-1 standard. It can be 2 chars (Alpha-2) or 3 chars (Alpha-3) type.

tools.name: country.getLatestCountryDataByName
tools.description: Get latest data for specific country. Country name and format are in parametars.

tools.name: help.getListOfCountries
tools.description: Get name name, alpha-2, alpha-3 code, latitude and longitude for every country.

tools.name: totals.getDailyReportTotals
tools.description: Get daily report data for whole world.

tools.name: totals.getLatestTotals
tools.description: Get latest data for whole world.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
